subcodes.first_line: O thou who art enkindled with the fire of My love, who gazeth upon My countenance and traverseth the lands for My nearness and reunion with Me [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا ایها المشتعل بنار حبی و الناظر الی وجهی و السایر فی البلاد لقربی و لقائی
subcodes.subjects: @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience, @walking the spiritual path; spiritual wayfaring; the virtuous life, @the Word of God; influence and centrality of, @presence [liqa'] of Manifestation of God is presence of God, @nearness and remoteness
